core.label: Perl Fundamentals
core.description: Syntax, variables, operators, and basic I/O.

topics.label: Installation & Running Scripts
topics.description: Install Perl and run scripts with perl script.pl. Perl is pre-installed on most Unix systems.

topics.label: Scalars ($)
topics.description: Single values — strings, numbers, references. The $ sigil marks scalar context.

topics.label: Arrays (@)
topics.description: Ordered lists with push, pop, shift, unshift, splice, sort, grep, map.

topics.label: Hashes (%)
topics.description: Key-value pairs with keys, values, each, exists, delete.

topics.label: Operators
topics.description: String (eq, ne, lt) vs numeric (==, !=, <) operators. Context sensitivity is core to Perl.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if/elsif/else, unless, while, until, for, foreach, and statement modifiers.

topics.label: Regular Expressions
topics.description: Perl's regex engine is legendary — m//, s///, qr//, captures, and modifiers. Regex is Perl's superpower.

topics.label: Subroutines
topics.description: Define functions with sub, pass arguments via @_, return values. Perl subs are flexible.

topics.label: File I/O
topics.description: Open, read, write files with open/close and filehandles. Always use three-argument open.

topics.label: use strict & use warnings
topics.description: Enable strict mode and warnings for safer code. Always start scripts with these pragmas.

core.label: References & Data Structures
core.description: References, complex data structures, and OOP.

topics.label: References
topics.description: Create references with \, dereference with $, @, %, ->. References enable complex data structures.

topics.label: Complex Data Structures
topics.description: Arrays of arrays, hashes of arrays, arrays of hashes. Build nested structures with references.

topics.label: OOP Basics
topics.description: bless references into packages for object-oriented Perl. Perl OOP is built on packages and references.

topics.label: Moose/Moo
topics.description: Modern OOP with Moose (full-featured) or Moo (lightweight). Declarative attributes and roles.

topics.label: Error Handling
topics.description: die, warn, eval for exception handling. Try::Tiny for clean try/catch syntax.

topics.label: Modules & CPAN
topics.description: use/require modules and install from CPAN. CPAN is Perl's massive library ecosystem.

topics.label: Testing (Test::More)
topics.description: Write tests with ok, is, like, done_testing. Perl has a strong testing culture.

topics.label: Text Processing
topics.description: One-liners, awk-like processing, and text transformation. Perl excels at text munging.
